data.body:
Goal:
Apply the stronger completed visual treatment to all terminal knots shown in the Setlist UI, including shipped and abandoned, and update the selected execution-plan summary to show the number of still-workable scheduled knots rather than the full scheduled row count.

Verification:
1. Open a Setlist plan containing both open and terminal knots and confirm shipped and abandoned rows share the de-emphasized terminal treatment while non-terminal knots keep the active styling.
2. Confirm the selected plan summary badge/label reports the remaining workable scheduled knots rather than the full scheduled total.
3. Run `bun run lint`, `bunx tsc --noEmit`, `bun run test`, and `bun run build` and confirm they pass.

Constraints:
- Keep the change scoped to Setlist terminal-knot presentation and selected-plan count copy.
- Do implementation work in the dedicated Setlist worktree.
data.title: Apply terminal Setlist cues and workable counts
